title: Doctor's Appointment
context: You are calling or speaking to a clinic receptionist to arrange a medical appointment. Explain your symptoms, ask about available times, and respond to questions about urgency and personal details.
user_role: A patient trying to book an appointment at a local clinic
agent_role: A clinic receptionist checking symptoms and appointment availability
opening_prompt: Good afternoon, CityCare Clinic speaking. How may I help you today?
